engagement.name: HealthBridge GTM Strategy
engagement.desired_outcome: Go-to-market strategy for HealthBridge's remote patient monitoring platform targeting the UK NHS and German statutory health insurance (GKV) markets
engagement.scope: B2B2C digital health platform, 2 target markets (UK, Germany), regulatory-dependent (CE marking, DiGA pathway)
constraints: Must achieve first paying customers within 12 months
Seed funding runway: 18 months at current burn rate
DiGA (Germany) and DTAC (UK) compliance required before sales
Team: 4 commercial staff, no established distribution network

decisions.decision: Focus GTM on DiGA pathway in Germany as primary, UK NHS as secondary
decisions.rationale: DiGA offers faster reimbursement pathway; UK DTAC timeline uncertain post-2025 reforms

decisions.decision: Partner-led distribution via established MedTech distributor
decisions.rationale: 4-person commercial team cannot build direct sales at required velocity
